parameters.subject: New corporate enquiry
parameters.message:
=

Hi Corporate Sales team,

A customer has submitted a bulk/corporate order enquiry that requires your attention. Please review the details below and follow up with the customer directly.

Customer: {{ $('spilt items').item.json.customerName }} ({{ $('spilt items').item.json.customerEmail }})
Subject: {{ $('spilt items').item.json.subject }}
Buyer Persona:{{ $('spilt items').item.json.persona }}
Theme:{{ $('spilt items').item.json.theme }}
Order ID: {{ $('spilt items').item.json.orderId ?? 'N/A' }}

Customer message:

{{ $('spilt items').item.json.customerMessage }}

Please reply to the customer at {{ $('spilt items').item.json.customerEmail }} and CC cs@boldr.co once handled.

— BOLDR CS Customer Service
